items.title: Infrastructure as Code on AWS with TypeScript
items.description: In this hands-on workshop, learn how to use Pulumi to provision real AWS infrastructure with TypeScript. Adam walks through the building blocks — declarative resources, stacks, outputs — and ties them together by deploying a working multi-tier application: a database, a backend…

items.title: How AI Agents Turned 5 Engineers Into 50
items.description: How does a small team ship custom code into customer cloud accounts in a day or two? Adam talks to Ewan Dawson, CTO of Compostable AI, about how they leaned into agentic AI for everything from product to infrastructure — and the rules they learned for building an "AI software…

items.title: Docker Secrets | Pulumi Q&A
items.description: Key topics covered: - Common misconceptions about Docker Secrets - Why secrets shouldn't be stored in Docker images - Runtime vs. build-time secrets management - Secure alternatives for managing secrets - Best practices for container security
